inputs.text: Doctor sahab, mujhe bahut tezi se bukhar chadha hai, sir mein bahut dard hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of high fever and severe headache is common in Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever can also present with sudden onset of high fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, Dengue typically presents with additional symptoms such as retro-orbital pain

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, doctor sahab kya yeh koi sankramak bimari hai?

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic symptoms of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Chikungunya can also cause joint pain, but retro-orbital pain is more specific to Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever may not typically cause such severe bone pain

inputs.text: Doctor sahab, meri tabiyat kuch theek ho rahi thi lekin ab mujhe lal daane nikaal aaye hain aur masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The appearance of rash and bleeding gums are cardinal signs of Dengue hemorrhagic fever

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely to cause such severe hemorrhagic symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause severe symptoms but the combination of rash and bleeding gums points more towards Dengue

inputs.text: Doctor sahab, main bahut kamzor ho gaya hoon, meri tabiyat abhi tak theek nahi hui hai, kya yeh Dengue hai?
inputs.image_desc: patient on cot, unable to move

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The prolonged and severe nature of symptoms, including extreme weakness, confirms Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the severity and specific symptoms of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific combination of symptoms pointing towards Dengue
